name: security-review
description: Evaluations for security-review skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when implementing security-sensitive features

prompts.input: I'm adding user authentication to this API endpoint — review it for security issues
prompts.reason: Authentication implementation is a primary trigger for this skill

prompts.input: Help me store API keys and secrets securely in this application
prompts.reason: Secrets management is a core security concern this skill addresses

prompts.input: Review this file upload handler for security vulnerabilities
prompts.reason: File upload handling is explicitly listed as a trigger scenario

prompts.input: I need to implement payment processing — what security checks do I need?
prompts.reason: Payment feature implementation is a listed trigger scenario

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for general coding or performance requests

prompts.input: How do I center a div in CSS?
prompts.reason: CSS layout question, not security related

prompts.input: Optimize this SQL query for better performance
prompts.reason: Performance optimization, not a security concern

prompts.input: What is the difference between REST and GraphQL?
prompts.reason: Architecture comparison question, not security review
